---
title: '`syncweaver templates`'
---

List and copy the bundled GitHub Actions workflow templates into a repository.

| Subcommand | Description |
|---|---|
| [`add`](add.qmd) | Copy a named template into the output directory |
| [`list`](list.qmd) | List all available workflow templates |

## Usage

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from ccbr_tools.shell import shell_run

help_text = shell_run("syncweaver templates --help")
print("```")
print(help_text)
print("```")
```
